testcase.name: test_multichip_watcher_stress[blackhole-p300-1x4-ring]

testcase.system-err:
--------------------------------- Captured Err --------------------------------- -------------------------------------------------------------------------- It appears as if there is not enough space for /dev/shm/sm_segment.23ff5195c3f7.1000.9100000.0 (the shared-memory backing file). It is likely that your MPI job will now either abort or experience performance degradation.
Local host: 23ff5195c3f7 Space Requested: 16777216 B Space Available: 17489920 B -------------------------------------------------------------------------- 2026-07-18 14:22:00.605 | DEBUG | ttnn.device:__init__:152 - Using default dispatch core type for this system: DispatchCoreType.WORKER 2026-07-18 14:22:00.606 | DEBUG | ttnn.device:__init__:154 - Using default dispatch core axis for this system: DispatchCoreAxis.COL 2026-07-18 14:22:01.455 | DEBUG | conftest:mesh_device:599 - multidevice with 4 devices is created Building brisc, compile step: cd /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal-cache/tt-metal-cache15229645552935298160/kernels/reader_bmm_tile_layout_in1_sender_writer_padding/14366845902847478815/brisc/ && -fno-use-cxa-atexit -g -MMD -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-error=multistatement-macros -Wno-error=parentheses -Wno-error=unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-variable
